Documentation.long_help: Extrudes selected triangles of a triangulated surface. With Average Normals on, uses one area-weighted average normal for the whole patch; with it off, each cap vertex moves along its own point normal (from selected incident triangles). The triangles in the original location are removed; the output keeps unselected geometry, adds an offset copy of the selection (top cap), and side quads along the selection boundary (open shell). Selection follows VESPA Region Fairing (vtkSelection / SelectionInput). vtkExtractSelection is used internally (vtkOriginalCellIds on cells, or vtkOriginalPointIds with all incident triangles). Without a selection, you may set Selection Cell Array Name on the input surface. Unselected non-triangle cells are omitted. Animate Extrusion Distance for interactive-style feedback.
Documentation.short_help: Extrude selected surface patch (average or per-vertex normals; selection input).

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: vtkSelection describing cells or points to extrude (same convention as VESPA Region Fairing).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ExtrusionDistance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Extrusion Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Displacement magnitude along the average normal (negative values invert along the same axis).

IntVectorProperty.name: FlipExtrusionDirection
IntVectorProperty.label: Flip Direction
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Extrude along the opposite of the computed average normal (before sign of Extrusion Distance).

IntVectorProperty.name: AverageNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Average Normals (aggregate)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on (default), the whole selection uses one area-weighted average face normal. When off, each top-cap vertex moves along its own point normal (area-weighted blend of normals from selected triangles incident to that vertex). Field data SHYX_SelectionExtrude_AvgNormal is always the patch average face normal for reference.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Selection Cell Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: If Selection is empty: name of a cell data array on Input (scalar or integral). Triangles are selected when value > 0.5 (float) or non-zero (integer types).
